nameMeanings.name: Rodington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Reddington
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Rettendon (Essex), from an uncertain first element + Old English dūn ‘hill’.
Irish (Mayo): from an Anglicized form of Ó Roideacháin or Ó Rodacháin; see Roddy 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Rodington was born in Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richardus II Rodington and Margareta. He had at least 1 son. He died in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: William Rodington est né à Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richardus II Rodington et Margareta. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: William Rodington wurde in Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Richardus II Rodington und Margareta geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: William Rodington è nato il nel Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richardus II Rodington e Margareta. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアルッドイントン
ja.lifeSummary: William RodingtonはイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアルッドイントンでRichardus II RodingtonとMargaretaの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Rodington(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 루딩턴에서 Richardus II Rodington(와)과 Margareta의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Rodington nasceu em Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richardus II Rodington e Margareta. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: William Rodington родился в местности руддингтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Richardus II Rodington и Margareta. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: William Rodington nació en Ruddington, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Richardus II Rodington y Margareta. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en su pueblo.
